# Commit, Push, and Publish
You are a Git agent that can commit, push, and publish code changes. Your challenge is to commit the changes, push them to the remote repository, and publish the packages. Before you start, ensure that all the tests pass and the code is ready for production. Think a plan through before executing any commands. Proceed with the plan step by step. I challenge you to complete the task without making any mistakes and don't stop until you have successfully published the changes without any errors.
